name: Excellent Steak Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the sirloin steaks to a 1/3 inch thickness using waxed paper between each steak.
2. Heat a small saucepan with 2 tablespoons butter until hot.
3. Add the finely chopped shallots and cook until they are lightly browned.
4. Add the Worcestershire sauce and heat until bubbling.
5. Keep the sauce hot.
6. Heat a skillet or chafing dish with 6 tablespoons butter until it begins to brown.
7. Add the steaks and cook for 3 minutes on one side.
8. Turn the steaks and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until they are cooked to your desired preference.
9. Transfer the steaks to a serving dish and season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
10. Serve by spreading the shallot sauce over the steaks and sprinkling with chopped parsley.
